opportunity.name: Pixel Forge Games – Submissions
opportunity.description: Indie publisher accepting roguelikes, puzzle, narrative, tactics, survival, arcade. Solo and small teams (up to 15). Playable build or vertical slice required. PC (Steam, Epic, GOG) and/or console (Switch, Xbox). 6–18 month scope preferred.
opportunity.eligibility_summary: Indie-friendly genres; solo/small team; 6–18 months; PC/console

opportunity.name: ID@Xbox
opportunity.description: Microsoft's program for independent developers to publish digital games on Xbox. No fee to apply. Access to dev kits, support, and store presence.
opportunity.eligibility_summary: Indie devs; digital games for Xbox

opportunity.name: PlayStation Partners
opportunity.description: Sony's program for indie and third-party publishers. Support for PS5/PS4 development, funding opportunities, and visibility.

opportunity.name: Humble Bundle – Publishing
opportunity.description: Humble publishes indie games and helps with visibility, store pages, and bundles. Focus on PC; interest in diverse and narrative-driven games.
opportunity.eligibility_summary: Indie PC games; narrative and variety

opportunity.name: Indie Fund
opportunity.description: Recoupable investment for indie developers. No equity; you repay from revenue. Looking for strong design and scope that can ship.
opportunity.eligibility_summary: Indie teams; recoupable funding; no equity
